faqs.question: Is it worth to consider S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.
MBA/PGDM Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
MCA Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

faqs.answer: S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology has been rated 4 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology has also been rated 3.3 for Campuslife.

placements.overview: Established in 2001, S. Veerasamy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology is located in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 13 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good faculty staffs and good placement 2022 year pass out students.

review_content.Placements: Placement available, 100 percent placement, iam 2022 year passout student I am selected NCR CORPORATION, MWC, chengalpet, Chennai, and my friends selected many company, salary package is average, company good working place no stress and simple work,. .
review_content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi available, Lab facility is good and Lathe turning lab, Thermal boiler And all Laboratory instrument Available, Class room :situated a natural spiral around the college. Library available all local &foreign author books,. Hostel room is good food average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Really the best university of Tamil Nadu.

review_content.Placements: There are 120 students in our college, Anna university. This is the best university in Tamil Nadu, people from different places comes here for higher studies. We all are the batch of 2015-2019. Campus selection is well organised here. Maximum selected each year .
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole campus is 24*7 Wi-Fi enabled. Infrastructure here are quite standard. All buildings are kept nest and clean. Sports field, common room, library, auditorium room indoor playing ground all are present in my college. It is the all in one place for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with faculty members and good infrastructure but dissatisfied with the placements.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course were placed. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 15,000 to 18,000 per month. There are no top recruiting companies for our course. About 70% of the students got internships from our course. Companies want students to learn courses. The mechanical course offers many types of works in many industries, etc. KMNL Water and Treating company offer placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi facility, labs, classrooms, library, hostel, bus facilities and sports. The quality of the food served is not worthy, and I will give 1 star out of 5 stars for the food. Our college provides extracurricular activities. The food served in the canteen and hostel is the same.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It's not a good college for placements.

review_content.Placements: No core company visit the campus for placements. Most of the companies that visit here are from the BPO sector, and they commonly choose people from all departments. There are nearly 30 students in our class, and around 10 students got placed in 4 companies. There may be chances for the students to get multiple placement offers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Unlimited Wi-Fi facilities are available for students, but there are some restrictions. Games and sports facilities are not available here. Since most of the students are day scholars, they are not interested in sports. We have multiple playgrounds, but we don't have any time for sports as the classes are conducted for 8 hours.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2012
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: Anna University (AU), formerly Perarignar Anna University of Technology (PAUT), is a technical university in Tamil Nadu, India. It's been ranked 7th best university in India. The university encompasses within it one of the oldest technical institutes in the world and has a history spanning 220 years (As of 2014). It was renamed 'Anna University' on 4 September 1978 as a unitary university, named after C. N. Annadurai. It became an affiliating university in 2001, absorbing about 250 engineering colleges in Tamil Nadu. Between 2007 and 2010, it was split into six universities, namely, Anna University, Chennai, Anna University, Chennai - Taramani Campus, Anna University Chennai - Regional Office, Tiruchirappalli, Anna University Chennai - Regional Office, Coimbatore, Anna University Chennai - Regional Office, Tirunelveli, and Anna University Chennai - Regional Office, Madurai. On September 14, 2011, a bill was passed to merge back the universities. Anna University has once again become a single affiliating university for engineering colleges all over Tamil Nadu from August 1, 2012. The university departments include College of Engineering, Guindy campus, Madras Institute of Technology - Chromepet campus, ACT campus and SAP campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty staffs and good placement 2022 year pass out students.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi available, Lab facility is good and Lathe turning lab, Thermal boiler And all Laboratory instrument Available, Class room :situated a natural spiral around the college. Library available all local &foreign author books,. Hostel room is good food average.

reviews.review_heading: Really the best university of Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is 24*7 Wi-Fi enabled. Infrastructure here are quite standard. All buildings are kept nest and clean. Sports field, common room, library, auditorium room indoor playing ground all are present in my college. It is the all in one place for students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members and good infrastructure but dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi facility, labs, classrooms, library, hostel, bus facilities and sports. The quality of the food served is not worthy, and I will give 1 star out of 5 stars for the food. Our college provides extracurricular activities. The food served in the canteen and hostel is the same.

reviews.review_heading: It's not a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Unlimited Wi-Fi facilities are available for students, but there are some restrictions. Games and sports facilities are not available here. Since most of the students are day scholars, they are not interested in sports. We have multiple playgrounds, but we don't have any time for sports as the classes are conducted for 8 hours.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Haryana. Students should take admission .

content.Placements: 99% of students gets placement in this civil engineering course 5 - 20 Lacs per annum are the packages offered in this course Larsen, Tata project 99% of students got internship in this course Civil engineer is the top roles offered in this course .
content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi, all labs related to civil department with all facilities, classroom with SMART boards, big and good library Hostel have home like food, cooler as well as AC rooms available, big cafeteria with greenery Volleyball court, football ground, cricket ground .

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good facilities are available, like those in big universities.

content.Placements: 99% of students get placements, and it is famous for its placements. There is also a separate office for the training and placement officer who helps students get internships or placements. The starting package ranges from 25,000 per month to 20 LPA, with companies like Universal, Maruti Suzuki, Hyundai, Honda, etc. 99% of students get internships, with top roles as managers, supervisors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi is available, and all labs are accessible for different departments. Smart boards are present in all classes, and there is also a good library. In the hostel, there are AC rooms as well as cooler rooms, based on your choice. The canteen offers home-like food, laundry facilities, and good bathrooms. There are also big playgrounds for cricket, football, and volleyball.

The Wi-Fi facility is not available, and there is one lab that is also not in good condition. Classrooms are very dirty and there are broken fans in the classroom. The benches are always dirty.

individual_reviews.title: The placements are poor, and not an accurate way of studying.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good but facility is average. Labs and classrooms are good. Hostels are good in college. Food of the hostel is average in taste but the food is made every time fresh and new. Not the left food is given to the students. Library and Wi-Fi are below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My opinion about RPSCET Blana Mahendergarh.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is nearly 3-5%. Placement in our college is very poor. The highest on-campus placement is 9 LPA, and off-campus is 25 LPA. The lowest package is 1.8 LPA, and the average is near 2-3 LPA. Top recruiter companies are TCS, Infosys, etc. There is no on-campus internship available on our campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is moderate and decent. There is no Wi-Fi available on campus or in the hostel. Labs are good enough, classrooms are spacious, and there is a central library available from where we can borrow books. Every 15 days, we have to renew our books, otherwise a fine of 2 rupees per day is charged.

description: Rao Pahlad Singh Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Rao Pahlad Singh Group of Institutions can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Rao Pahlad Singh Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 637628 and 783567 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 637628, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 637628.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: Rao Pahlad Singh Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good college in Haryana. Students should take admission .
reviews.review_text:
High-speed Wi-Fi, all labs related to civil department with all facilities, classroom with SMART boards, big and good library 
Hostel have home like food, cooler as well as AC rooms available, big cafeteria with greenery 
Volleyball court, football ground, cricket ground .

reviews.review_heading: Very good facilities are available, like those in big universities.
reviews.review_text: High-speed Wi-Fi is available, and all labs are accessible for different departments. Smart boards are present in all classes, and there is also a good library. In the hostel, there are AC rooms as well as cooler rooms, based on your choice. The canteen offers home-like food, laundry facilities, and good bathrooms. There are also big playgrounds for cricket, football, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very bad college. I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average or poor because there are classrooms but sometimes there is no electricity. The Wi-Fi facility is not available, and there is one lab that is also not in good condition. Classrooms are very dirty and there are broken fans in the classroom. The benches are always dirty.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are poor, and not an accurate way of studying.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but facility is average. Labs and classrooms are good. Hostels are good in college. Food of the hostel is average in taste but the food is made every time fresh and new. Not the left food is given to the students. Library and Wi-Fi are below average.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion about RPSCET Blana Mahendergarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is moderate and decent. There is no Wi-Fi available on campus or in the hostel. Labs are good enough, classrooms are spacious, and there is a central library available from where we can borrow books. Every 15 days, we have to renew our books, otherwise a fine of 2 rupees per day is charged.

reviews.review_heading: This college is placed in a rural area, so there are no places for exploring.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, but Wi-Fi facility is not provided by the campus. There are no AC rooms on the campus, but proper ventilation in the rooms. Mess quality is average. The library is average. The canteen is too cheap for boys. AC labs on campus. The condition of labs is good.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the teachers, placement drives are also poor.
reviews.review_text: All the computer labs are fully furnished and with Wi-Fi, proper classrooms with smart LEDs, and a big library with about 10,000 books related to courses. Hostels are fully furnished with a great food menu with different foods on different days. Sports events are held twice a year.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for local area students.
reviews.review_text:
The hostel is very good at maintaining discipline, cleaning mess and the canteen also has good food and seating arrangements. 
Classrooms are fully furnished and have projectors in them. 
The library is well maintained and has completed books for every course and every subject .

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: There are a couple of labs in college and one library. Wi-Fi is available in labs, and food is good but backward in sports. Classrooms are quite good, but no air conditioning is available in the classroom. Food is not so good; mess food is of low quality, and medical facilities are zero. Also, in sports, there are no games.

reviews.review_heading: If students want to study with low fees, they can definitely opt for this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are in pretty good condition for learning. The college has computer labs for practicals. The library is not good. The problem is that our college is in a backward area of Haryana, so girls and boys cannot hang out together.

reviews.review_heading: ne of the best college in the sense of discipline, education, transportation, safety and security.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities in this campus are totally fine. The structure of the labs and classrooms is outstanding, but many restrictions are imposed on the students. The quality of mess in the hostel is very hygienic and students agree with this food easily.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the placements and faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good enough. Good classrooms and all types of labs needed are available on campus. Fully advanced classrooms are available for students to study conveniently. There is a huge library with thousands of books and it is a silent place for studying.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided by the college, including, free Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms, a canteen, labs, etc. The college provides a hostel facility. They provide other facilities, like a playground and different sports. They also provide medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Information about RPS college in my words in my experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms and labs is good but there is a big problem with electricity during summer days. Facilities of the hostel are available but the meal is hygienic for students and the quality of the meal is good. The department of this course always launched a new programme in the college and medical facilities are also but you to only just registered your name and roll no. in the register.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rao Pahlad Singh Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The college is good. It also has almost every course. The hostel is normal, but not very good. The college fee for every course is affordable and low. There is almost every facility available for students, like a bus facility, ATM, a hostel for both boys and girls, etc.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 1 LPA. Recruiting companies are TCL, Microsoft, etc. Roles offered are programmers and designers. Around 25% of students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a lot of facilities for studying. Our college has the best environment for studying and playing games. It has a library and classrooms. It has labs like computer labs, mechanical labs, and other labs. Students here go to other places to play games.

faqs.answer: Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 4 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering, VLSI Design, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science?

faqs.answer: Courses offered by Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science are M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science offers specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering, VLSI Design, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science for students?

faqs.answer: Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science goes up to 372.
faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Helapuri Institute of Technology and Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

reviews_list.review_title: Total disaster inside the college.

review_content.Placements: The campus interviews are conducted just for the formality sake. Also, no placement training is given to students. If someone is selected for the interview, he or she is never called for the job by the respected company. They just can't give you simple placement interview tips or points. You just can't get a job from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole college does not look like an engineering college because just 5 buildings are built with some distance. But there are new buildings, so it looks good. Also, the hostel and canteen food are good here. In the laboratory, most of the equipment was not in a working condition, the faculty just gives you the readings to complete the written test.

admission_process.title: Samalkha Group of Institutions - Admission Office Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Samalkha Group of Institutions - Admission Officeis currently accepting applications for various courses. Students seeking to get into the institute need to satisfy the admission criteria of the desired course before applying. Also known asSGI Admission Office, the institute provides multiple courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. These programmes are offered in affiliation with Kurukshetra University (KUK). Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, selection criteria, and admission process for the SGI Admission Office.

SGI Admission Office admission criteriaare mainly merit-based. However, students may have to provide valid entrance exam scores if the institute deems it necessary. Applicants have to pass Class 12 for UG admissions, whereas graduation is needed for PG admissions. Students can also enrol into diploma programmes at the institute. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria forSGI Admission Office courses:

The admission process forSamalkha Group of Institutions - Admission Officecommences both online and offline. It starts off with registration and selection followed by admission confirmation. Students need to meet the admission criteria and follow the entire process to get a seat at the institute. Eligible students can follow the steps explained below:
Step 1: Application Process

Students can obtain the prescribed form and prospectus from the registered office by paying a certain amount of fees either via cash or DD. Alternatively, students can also apply online at the official website of the institute.
Step 2: Selection Process
The institute selects candidates based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. However, if required, students may have to provide scores obtained by them in the accepted entrance test.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, students need to pay theSGI admission feesto secure their spot at the institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Somewhat I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Many students got placements due to well study facility, training about the interview, and job awareness ideas. Students got placements in software, MNC, electrical, and also other companies. Internship course was taken by students from government and non-governmental institutes.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs and library are properly managed. Food quality is manageable, and only vegetarian foods are available. Hostel facility is good, well-designed rooms and toilets. The emergency light system is available, and any time the medical facility is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to get knowledge and make your future.

review_content.Placements: All passed out students get jobs in good companies, and about 78% of the students got placed from our course. I have no idea about the salary packages offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, faculty members are very friendly. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the computer lab. Labs are well-build and well designed to do experiments. Classrooms are well designed, and all classrooms are equipped with projectors and laptops.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are cooperative, well qualified, knowledgeable. Their teaching quality was very good. We perform all the activities in the class, and they give less homework to students.

faqs.answer: RadhaKrishna Institute of Technology and Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Maths and any one subject out of 14 subjects (Physics/ Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship) and obtained at least 45% marks for general (40% marks for in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.MCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. OR Candidate who have completed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level can also apply. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.

review_summary.college_name: RadhaKrishna Institute of Technology and Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a decent college with supportive faculty, good infrastructure, and moderate placements.

content.Placements: 65 to 70 percent students from our batch get placed through campus recruitment drives. The highest package is 7.5 LPA and the lowest package is 2.4 LPA. The average package is 3.5 LPA. Students get placed in companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, TCS iON, Internshala partners, startups in Bhubaneswar and Hyderabad and local software firms through college tie ups. Roles like software developer, web developer, Java developer, QA/testing engineer, support engineer, data analyst and system analyst are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: Our computer science department at RITE College (BPUT) has good facilities, including Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, spacious classrooms, and a library with relevant books and e-resources. Hostels are decent, with regular cleaning and basic amenities. The mess food is simple and hygienic, though average in taste. A small canteen is available for snacks. Basic medical facilities and emergency tie-ups with a nearby hospital are provided. The college also encourages sports, offering facilities for cricket, volleyball, badminton, and indoor games. Overall, the infrastructure supports both academic and personal development of students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I think its location is odd, otherwise its okay.

content.Placements: 25 to 35 percent of students got placed in our course in my college. The highest and the lowest package of this course is 6 lakhs and 3 lakhs, respectively, per annum. 40 percent of students got internships from our course in different companies like I Infotech, Quate, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are various facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department, like unlimited Wi-Fi, a central library, well-maintained labs, AC classrooms, etc. Hostel quality was very good in this college, but the bathroom was not separate for each room. Food quality had variety and was adjustable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Somewhat I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Many students got placements due to well study facility, training about the interview, and job awareness ideas. Students got placements in software, MNC, electrical, and also other companies. Internship course was taken by students from government and non-governmental institutes.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs and library are properly managed. Food quality is manageable, and only vegetarian foods are available. Hostel facility is good, well-designed rooms and toilets. The emergency light system is available, and any time the medical facility is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to get knowledge and make your future.

content.Placements: All passed out students get jobs in good companies, and about 78% of the students got placed from our course. I have no idea about the salary packages offered.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, faculty members are very friendly. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the computer lab. Labs are well-build and well designed to do experiments. Classrooms are well designed, and all classrooms are equipped with projectors and laptops.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are cooperative, well qualified, knowledgeable. Their teaching quality was very good. We perform all the activities in the class, and they give less homework to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college with okay placements and decent teachers.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed in my batch at a time. We got only 2 LPA as the highest package, and that is average. I think below average. Some companies conducted placement drives like QSpiders, Nextwave, etc. A web development role is offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi at labs, especially in the server room, for advanced computers. It has a big library. It provides many courses like computer science and engineering, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, civil engineering, MBA, MCA, etc.

Some of the courses include B.Sc., B.Ed and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 54,000 - 3,85,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technology:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 44,700 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: A few changes on the campus makes it more perfect.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, there are about 70 members. We have good faculty and labs at the same time. The faculty are supportive in many ways with the matter of our interests. Cultural activities play a major role in bringing all branch students to one place, and it helps to build good relationships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are not up to the mark. The quality of studies is good. We had flexible timings, where we have learned quality things. Sports on the campus are limited, but some sports events are conducted by our branch head, and my team won 1st place in the cricket tournament.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Really our college very good for placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average, Infosys will come to our college and takes the students by the interview, students who have 85% CGPA will be selected for interview mostly byjus company will come to our college, company will also gives more package and good choice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty is very good and their teaching is somewhat good, but the college is not giving second Saturday as holiday and our college is getting gold medal in both indoor and outdoor games with other colleges and the faculty is having good qualification of lectures.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021

individual_reviews.title: No one was placed because of Covid 19. Infrastructure is not good, faculty is average.

content.Placements: No one was placed for my course and other courses due to covid-19 there was a lock down and no company came for placements. I haven't seen any top company coming to our Institute for placements, small companies do come which will give low package that to barely comes.
content.Infrastructure: If someone wants to take admission in mechanical, civil, EEE in this college I suggest you to don't take admission. Better to wait for next phase. College infrastructure is not too good. If you are looking for placements after your graduation, this is not the right college. Better go for other college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the faculty members, infrastructure, etc.

content.Placements: There is no scope for mechanical and civil engineering students on this campus. We didn't get any on-campus interviews for this course. As per the latest information we got to know that mechanical engineering course is removed from the college. No one got the internship opportunity. We didn't get any interviews.
content.Infrastructure: It has the basic infrastructure. L abs have machines and equipment, but 80% of them won't work. There is no hostel in college, but we have a very small canteen where the owner gets food from outside like bakery items. Sports are conducted once a year with all requests.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A few changes on the campus makes it more perfect.

content.Placements: In my batch, there are about 70 members. We have good faculty and labs at the same time. The faculty are supportive in many ways with the matter of our interests. Cultural activities play a major role in bringing all branch students to one place, and it helps to build good relationships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are not up to the mark. The quality of studies is good. We had flexible timings, where we have learned quality things. Sports on the campus are limited, but some sports events are conducted by our branch head, and my team won 1st place in the cricket tournament.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really our college very good for placements.

content.Placements: Placements are average, Infosys will come to our college and takes the students by the interview, students who have 85% CGPA will be selected for interview mostly byjus company will come to our college, company will also gives more package and good choice.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty is very good and their teaching is somewhat good, but the college is not giving second Saturday as holiday and our college is getting gold medal in both indoor and outdoor games with other colleges and the faculty is having good qualification of lectures.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: There were few placements for our senior batch. Only 10% of students were placed. The average salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month. The highest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 8,000 per month. Mostly startup companies visit our college for placements. MNCs may visit the campus for placements. Our college provides roles only in the BPO sector with low salary packages. Internships are the not provided in our college. Students are just fed-up with their affiliated university examinations. Placement cell is available in our college, but it doesn't have a proper way to maintain it.

admission_process.title: Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.Jagruti Institute of Engineering and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, TS EAMCET, and TSBIE. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 44,700 - 2,00,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

faqs.answer: Maha Barathi Engineering College offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 5 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Maha Barathi Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, Structural Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Maha Barathi Engineering College?

faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Maha Barathi Engineering College are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Maha Barathi Engineering College has a rating of 1.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 2, 1, 2 and 2 as per reviews by students.
faqs.question: Q: Is Maha Barathi Engineering College a known college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Maha Barathi Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed. The average salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month, and it may change for different categories. Mahindra is one of the top companies for us, and general manager is the top role offered for us. The lowest salary offered ranges from Rs. 8,000 to 12,000 per month. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Choose a good college and build your career.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are good. More than 70% of the students in my batch got placed. We just need to listen to our placement coordinators. They train us right from our first semester, which builds our confidence in communication skills and knowledge about the corporate world.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college. The campus is great with a lush greenery, library, labs and well-furnished classrooms. Hostel rooms and food provided are average. The facilities provided to students and faculty are to be improved. The library has all the books required by the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: We can have a very good experience.

content.Placements: The placements are good, and even the training is good. They train on aptitude, GD, basic computer, related extension course. I have even heard that they have even tied up with Q Spiders and try to extend their placement records. Overall, there is a good effort from management.
content.Infrastructure: The college has great infrastructure. It has a canteen, hostel and playground. It is an 18 acres campus. The hostels are good and well-maintained. The canteen is not that good, and the management keeps on changing. They have good classes with great infrastructure and well-maintained labs.

The facilities provided to students and faculty are to be improved. The library has all the books required by the students.

reviews.review_heading: We can have a very good experience.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure. It has a canteen, hostel and playground. It is an 18 acres campus. The hostels are good and well-maintained. The canteen is not that good, and the management keeps on changing. They have good classes with great infrastructure and well-maintained labs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty. Good placements in 2017.
reviews.review_text: There are good library facilities for students. We got a free Wi-Fi facility via which we can go through useful things. There is a good sports department and every year, we enjoy a lot. There will be an inter-college meet for fests and sports. There will be a VTU collegiate meet for sports as well. They do yoga camps and blood camps every year.

I am pursuing mechanical engineering and this is my final year. Since my batch is the first batch of the college, I can give a genuine review about this college. It has excellent infrastructure and the faculty is awesome. Various events like cultural fest, sports day, ethnic day, etc. are celebrated. Lecturers encourage the students to take part in various academic activities. Overall, there is a friendly and educative environment. I am pursuing mechanical engineering and this is my final year. Since my batch is the first batch of the college, I can give a genuine review about this college. It has excellent infrastructure and the faculty is awesome. Various events like cultural fest, sports day, ethnic day, etc. are celebrated. Lecturers encourage the students to take part in various academic activities. Overall, there is a friendly and educative environment.

reviews.review_heading: A good college. Strongly recommended to become a successful engineer.
reviews.review_text: The classes are very neat and tidy. Cleanliness is well maintained. Labs are equipped with modern equipments, very good books which helps us are placed in library. Wi-Fi is also available here. They encourage for various sports also. The quality of food available in canteen here is also in both good quality and quantity.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with great faculty and education.
reviews.review_text: Good environmental friendly area. The campus is bigger than the requirement. Eco-friendly campus. Totally good infrastructure, labs are good, classrooms are big, medical facilities are there. Sports facilities are good with every sport available. The canteen is very big and the food is cheap.

faqs.answer: A:    Indus Institute of Technology Engineering offers Degree courses including 7 UG and 7 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Indus Institute of Technology Engineering has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Construction Engineering, Communications Engineering, Power Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Indus Institute of Technology Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Indus Institute of Technology Engineering has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Indus Institute of Technology Engineering has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Construction Engineering, Communications Engineering, Power Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does Indus Institute of Technology Engineering offer to students?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Indus Institute of Technology Engineering is up to 783. Good thing to know is that Indus Institute of Technology Engineering has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Indus Institute of Technology Engineering?

review_content.Placements: Placements are on average. Around 50-70% of students get placed who sit in the placement round. As per my knowledge, the highest package is 10 LPA. The lowest is around 2 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Accenture, and Wipro come for campus placement. As per government norms, completing 3 internships is compulsory during the course period. Here, students have to visit companies for internships. There is a very low chance of getting an internship from the college to a company. But the college provides various courses which can be submitted as internships and follows government norms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good campus, amazing crowd & celebration. No placement, few scholarships & changing faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In terms of job offers in my field i.e. civil engineering, Indus is not so successful. In my batch, barely 2 students out of the batch of 150 are placed in civil engineering. The previous batches had also face difficulties in searching jobs and had very low placement rate. They don't provide you with any field related/technical jobs, although marketing related jobs with a good package do come for B.Tech graduates. The placement cell is there which is really active. Placement rate for some engineering fields like computer, IT, EC is good for year 2019 But for the domains like Civil, Automobiles and Mechanical is extremely low.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: The placements were a rare phenomenon into this college. Most of our seniors didn't get placed and the story was same for our batch. Most of the opportunities that we got was from pool campus placements. Also, the company also encouraged students to apply for sales role in companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college was okay. I cannot talk about hostel facilities since I was not a part of it. But the food offered at the mess was really bad, sort of inedible. Infrastructure for sports purpose was quite inept. Even the single ground they had wasn't maintained properly.

admission_process.title: Indus Institute of Technology Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indus Institute of Technology Engineering admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Indus Institute of Technology Engineering considers scores in GATE, CAT, and ACPC Admission for admission to specific courses.Indus Institute of Technology Engineeringoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 4,03,200. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,72,200 - 2,64,600. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs.answer: M.A.M School of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

individual_reviews.title: It is a very bad college. I would not recommend joining this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a college of infrastructure and academics.

content.Placements: About 80% of students were placed in our department. The highest package was 47.3 Lacs per annum, the lowest was 2.5 Lacs per annum, and the average package was 8 Lacs per annum offered in our course. The top recruiting companies like Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, TCS, Cognizant, Persistent, and many more are in our course. About 50% of students get placed in TCS, Wipro, Persistent, and similar companies from our course. Some top roles like software developer, data scientist, AI engineer, cybersecurity analyst, etc., are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, biometric attendance, lifts, 24/7 camera surveillance, and many more facilities are available. The classrooms consist of smart screens, full air conditioning, and capacity for more than 150 students to sit. The food quality in our canteen is good. Sports and games events are regularly organized in our course at some intervals. Free modes of transportation are also available in the Jabalpur region.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Arts - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good to study in.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 11 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.3 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.4 LPA. Almost 25% of students got internships. The top role offered was of supervisor.
content.Infrastructure: Library is available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Sports and games facilities are excellent. The college is clean. The quality of food in the mess is not good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified, helpful, and knowledgeable. The course makes students ready for industry. The pass percentage is 40%, but with the help of teachers, students are able to score more than 85% in examinations. Our teachers are supportive.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: About 500 students are pursuing English Honours. The salary package offered is 5 LPA. Robert Half, Adecco, Insight Global, etc., companies hired our college students. About 70% of students got internships from English Honours course in Robert Half company.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, R.L.S.Y is one of the best colleges in Bettiah city and matches international standards. It is one of the few colleges of University of Muzaffarpur, which has upgraded its classrooms to facilitate teaching through modern tools and techniques.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Arts - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college's all facilities are good, and all teachers have good nature.

content.Placements: This year all students have been promoted due to covid-19, and the 1st-year course was very good. Top roles are offered in our course. The course in the first year is very good, and there is no problem with exams. None of the students got placed in our course.
content.Infrastructure: There are good arrangements in all rooms, and a science lab is available in our college. The library is very big, and it has a system. Good food is available in our hostels, and there is a good football field to play.
content.Faculty: All the teachers are very good, and they behave well with all the students and solve their problems. All the teachers are helpful, and all have good nature and very good knowledge. This course has developed the intelligence of all students, and this course is relevant for all students.

individual_reviews.title: Nurturing the future leaders.

content.Placements: Around 70 students are placed in our course. The top roles for these students involve managing the funds and profits of the companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides better infrastructure and fresh rooms with attached bathrooms. The rooms are spacious. individual_reviews.title: All the things are very well in this college.

content.Infrastructure: The arrangement system of the college is very good. It has a very big hostel and also a big library and a very good campus. Also, there is a big lab. I am very happy to give my review. I am very lucky because I have got a chance to share my experience with all.

Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,76,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 3 years.

The curriculum is divided into 4 - 6 semesters. Disha Institute of Management and Technology MBA/PGDM admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. Some other key highlights for Disha Institute of Management and Technology MBA/PGDM admissions are given below: Disha Institute of Management and Technology MBA/PGDM fees isINR 2,14,000and includes caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of these are charged only once during admissions. reviews.review_heading: Completely satisfied with facility provided by campus and because of its excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college was very good. All the facilities like labs, smart rooms, library canteen sports and games were available. For every department there are separate smart rooms and labs. All the useful and necessary books were available in library. Inter college competition were organised by the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Odisha to reach your goals.
reviews.review_text: It has cultural activity and events like annual function many programs like start up, State Level Competition and three canteen including Indian and western food. It has well facility on the campus, computer and Technology lab, mechanical and electronic lab, work shop, two or three libraries, sports competition, cricket, football and other activities and sports available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Nice Place For Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in our college is average, the Wi-Fi is password protected & they don't disclose anything to the students, there are no medical facilities in the college, there is only one canteen in the college & that is not even hygienic. Classrooms are very big & classes are taken with the help of projectors and screens. Hostel rooms are below average, the environment is not that good specially in boys hostel. We have a lift that does not work, we have air conditioners that are not even used.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Raipur to get the best knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The best and big campus with a large build area. The library with ample of books and space and also a digital library is there. The classrooms with projectors, audiovisual room, the theatre-like auditorium for various programmes and events, the open amphitheatre,  3 canteens, and water cooler in every department building.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members and infrastructure are awesome in this college, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: It has Wi-Fi facility on the campus. Computer and technology labs, mechanical and electronic labs, workshop,  2-3 libraries, sports competition, cricket, football, other activities and sports are available in the college. It has cultural events like annual functions, state-level competition and 3 canteens including Indian and western food.

Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. Teachers and infrastructure are very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are also comfortable. In our college, the library is also available. Facilities in the hostel are good, and the food quality is also good. Medical facilities are also available. Many sports grounds are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college ever. Waste of career.
reviews.review_text: Don't get fold just looking at the infrastructure of the college building. The only thing that looks good from outside is the infrastructure. They spend a good amount of money once the college was built. There are hundreds of computer systems, but maximum 20-25 students to use that.

My Experience in my college is very bad. The institute just want to earn money by applying different kind of fines. They Just Hire the Fresher as a lecturer who don't know anything there are just 4-5 lecturer who have a very good knowledge. They take money for A.C Rooms but never run the A.C as there is rural area no light. On the name of Practical’s they don't give the demo or anything which improve the student mind. college_info.college_name: BIS Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for BIS Group of Institutions admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BIS Group of Institutions offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Whereas, at PG level, BIS Group of Institutions offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. BIS Group of Institutions fee structure for all the courses is around INR 46,000 to 2,40,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied by the promise of placements.

review_content.Placements: The placements were there till 2014 batch, after that, there was nothing. Just the students took admission and passed their courses with 0% placement. There was a job fest for the 2012 batch, but the salary package was very low, it was unexpected, so I am dissatisfied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a Wi-Fi enabled campus, classrooms, well-maintained hi-tech library and good medical services were available. In the name of sports, there is an annual sports competition in a year, it was awesome. The food in the hostel was average. The canteen was in medium condition, so it was average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2024 and very good teachers.

review_content.Placements: 98% of students got placed successfully in college. The highest package was 12 LPA. The lowest package was 2.5 LPA. The average package was 5 LPA to 7 LPA. Recruiting companies were Paytm, Google, Microsoft, and Meta. 80% of students got internships at Paytm, Mobikwik, and BharatPe. Top role offered was data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities provided by college were best. Infrastructure for course was very well. Hostel rooms were clean and well-furnished. Quality of food in mess was very good in canteen. Food quality was maintained. Medical and sports facilities given by college were the best.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

paragraphs: BIS Group of Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.BIS Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate levels. Some of the courses include BCA, B.Com, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

highlights.summary:
Saveetha Amaravati University was established in 2017. It is recognised by Government of Andhra Pradesh with Gazette Notification Act No.18 of 2018. It is one of India's Leading Education Machineries, and the largest Specialist Centre for Education of all disciplines like Medicine, Dental Surgery, Engineering, Physiotherapy, Nursing, Management, Law, Architecture, Physical Education and Pharmacy.

At present the university is focusing on offering courses in Physiotherapy, Occupational therapy, Allied Health Sciences and Diploma courses in the emerging areas. The university has a College of Physiotherapy, College of Occupational Therapy and School of Medical Sciences.
